zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bolton I於1220年12月30日出生在英國越可爾博爾頓 白 包藍德時，他的父親Richard De Bolton I31歲，母親Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of England31歲。他於大約1255年與Isolda de Goldesborough在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1280年在英國英格蘭越可爾博爾頓 白 包藍德享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bolton I于1220年12月30日出生在英国越可爾博爾頓 白 包藍德时，他的父亲Richard De Bolton I31岁，母亲Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of England31岁。他于大约1255年与Isolda de Goldesborough在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1280年在英国英格兰越可爾博爾頓 白 包藍德享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bolton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern England named Bolton (Lancashire, Northumberland, Westmorland, and Yorkshire) or from Boulton in Derbyshire and East Lothian in Scotland, from Old English bothl ‘dwelling, house’ (see Bold 1) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Bold
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): from Middle English bold ‘dwelling-house’ (Old English bold the West Midland and northwestern form of Old English bōthl, bōtl), especially in the sense ‘castle or manor house’ for someone who lived or worked at the main house, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, for example Bold (Lancashire), The Bold in Aston Botterell (Shropshire), Booden Farm in Haughton, Booth in Blithfield, and Bull Bridge in Penkridge (all Staffordshire). Compare Bodle .
English: nickname from Middle English bold, Old English b(e)ald ‘bold, brave, noble’, which in Middle English developed the additional sense ‘arrogant, impudent, shameless’.
English: variant of   Bolt   and possibly a variant of   Bald   2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bolton I was born on 30 December 1220, in Bolton by Bowland, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard De Bolton I, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of England, was 31. He married Isolda de Goldesborough about 1255, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1280, in Bolton by Bowland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bolton I est né le 30 décembre 1220, à Bolton by Bowland, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard De Bolton I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of England, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Isolda de Goldesborough environ 1255, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1280, à Bolton by Bowland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bolton I am 30. Dezember 1220 in Bolton by Bowland, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Bolton I 31 und seine Mutter Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of England 31. Er hat um 1255 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Isolda de Goldesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1280 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Bolton by Bowland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bolton Iが1220年12月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ビー ボウランドで生まれた時，父Richard De Bolton Iは31歳，母Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of Englandは31歳であった。約1255年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでIsolda de Goldesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1280年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ビー ボウランドで61歳で死去した。

ko.Bolton-by-Bolland, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 비 보우랜드
ko.lifeSummary: John de Bolton I(이)가 1220년 12월 30일 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 비 보우랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Bolton I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of England(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Isolda de Goldesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 비 보우랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bolton I родился 30 декабря 1220 г. в местности болтон би боуланд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard De Bolton I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Eve De Bolton Of England, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda de Goldesborough около 1255 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1280 г. в местности болтон би боуланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
